title: Warm Intro
description: I'll take a careful look and put your name in front of the right person.
howItWorks: Not automated. I review each request and reach out to the job poster on your behalf. The poster opted in, so they're expecting it. Just be genuine.
noGuarantees: No guarantees. Hiring is messy and timelines shift. But it beats a cold apply.
successDisclaimer: Honest expectation: not every intro leads to a reply. Hiring timelines shift, roles get filled, people get busy. That's not on you. I'll do my part.
